name: CEO Agent
tagline: 2,654-line autonomous CEO — 16-phase execution cycle, venture scoring, PROMOTE/ENHANCE/CREATE/KILL decisions, GitGuard snapshots
content_angles: 2,654-line autonomous CEO agent that makes PROMOTE/ENHANCE/CREATE/KILL/DISCOVER decisions
GitGuard auto-snapshots protect against destructive changes
description: The brain of PRINTMAXX. Runs a 16-phase cycle: wake, checkpoint, git snapshot, intel gather, score ventures, decide (PROMOTE/ENHANCE/CREATE/KILL/DISCOVER), execute, alpha pipeline, research, content, decisions, health, autonomy, loop closer, audit, report. Makes autonomous business decisions 24/7 via launchd. GitGuard auto-snapshots before any destructive operation. MAX_CHANGES_PER_CYCLE = 5 to prevent runaway.
